top_signals.title: Petrochemicals Giant Braskem Seeks Support to Start Out-of-Court Rework
top_signals.summary: Braskem SA is seeking backing from creditors to begin an out-of-court restructuring process ahead of debt payments scheduled for July, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_signals.title: Press Remarks by Commissioner Lahbib on the 2026 Wildfire Preparedness Package
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 02 Jun 2026 A few weeks ago, at the end of April, my phone buzzed. It was a message from my team: “Wildfires in Belgium and the Netherlands. ERCC on alert”.
